title: medicago sativa subsp. media
intro: Medicago sativa subsp. media, also known as yellow clover, is a subspecies of the Medicago sativa plant, a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Medicago sativa subsp. media include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Medicago sativa subsp. media can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
